 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-219o","title":"TEST-HOST: Host + connector subprocess integration (no mocks)","description":"# TEST-HOST: Host + connector subprocess integration (no mocks)

## Goal
Run real fcp-host with actual connector binaries via stdio, validating discovery, invoke, receipts, and health without mock connectors.

## Scope
- Spawn connector binaries (test-echo, test-streaming, plus real connectors where safe).
- Validate host introspection output schemas and rate limit aggregation.
- Verify DecisionReceipt and audit event generation.

## Constraints
- No mocked host/connector interfaces.
- Use subprocess runner or in-process harness that launches real binaries.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Integration suite covers list/introspect/invoke/health across at least two real connectors.
- Logs include correlation IDs and structured JSON.
","notes":"[AlienArtifactPractical]
- Add evidence ledger fields with per-check log-odds contributions and explicit loss decision.
- Add anytime-valid risk control (e-process) for approvals/denials and record epsilon in receipts.
[ExtremeOptimizationPractical]
- Compile policies to DAG/BDD and cache allow/deny results with LRU.
- Use bitset capability sets for fast subset checks.

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-21cu","title":"SymbolRequest signature verification for unauthenticated peers","description":"SymbolRequest includes Ed25519 signature but MeshNode/handler never verifies it. Add verification using peer node signing keys (MeshIdentity/Tailscale attestation), treat verified requests as authenticated for anti-amplification, and add tests for bad signatures + key lookup failures.","notes":"[AlienArtifactPractical]
- Add spectral routing score (effective resistance / Laplacian) as optional metric and log chosen path.
- Set gossip TTL from measured mixing-time; add convergence test that asserts bound.
[ExtremeOptimizationPractical]
- Use SmallVec for usually-small object/symbol lists to reduce allocations.
- Batch symbol requests and use Bytes for zero-copy in hot paths.

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-21fq","title":"[TRACE] Trace format + redaction policy","description":"# [TRACE] Trace format + redaction policy

## Goal
Define a deterministic trace format and redaction rules for mesh capture.

## Deliverables
- Trace schema for FCPC/FCPS frames, routing decisions, admission outcomes, timestamps, trace_id.
- Redaction policy for secrets/PII and high-risk fields.
- Canonical encoding + hashing rules for stable replay.

## Tests
- Golden vectors for trace encoding/decoding.
- Redaction tests (sensitive fields never appear in output).

## Logging Requirements
- Structured JSON logs for trace schema tests:
  - {test, trace_id, redaction_applied, result, duration_ms}.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Trace format is versioned and stable.
- Redaction rules are deterministic and enforceable.","notes":"[AlienArtifactPractical]
- Add spectral routing score (effective resistance / Laplacian) as optional metric and log chosen path.
- Set gossip TTL from measured mixing-time; add convergence test that asserts bound.
[ExtremeOptimizationPractical]
- Use SmallVec for usually-small object/symbol lists to reduce allocations.
- Batch symbol requests and use Bytes for zero-copy in hot paths.

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-21p1","title":"[IDEA-15.3] CLI: fcp doctor self-check output","description":"## Goal
Expose connector self-checks in CLI `fcp doctor`.

## Details
- Add flags: `--connector <id>` and `--self-check`.
- Render structured output and JSON mode.

## Tests
- CLI snapshot tests for self-check output.

## Acceptance Criteria
- CLI output is stable and includes reason codes.","notes":"CLI doctor self-check output + mesh endpoint fetch + tests implemented (crates/fcp-cli/src/doctor/mod.rs + crates/fcp-cli/tests/doctor_test.rs). Blocked by flywheel_connectors-1n78.22 per beads; ready to close once unblocked.

[AlienArtifactPractical]
- Add spectral routing score (effective resistance / Laplacian) as optional metric and log chosen path.
- Set gossip TTL from measured mixing-time; add convergence test that asserts bound.
[ExtremeOptimizationPractical]
- Use SmallVec for usually-small object/symbol lists to reduce allocations.
- Batch symbol requests and use Bytes for zero-copy in hot paths.

Acceptance: All hardening fixes have explicit regression tests","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-05T07:43:30.512712Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-05T07:49:39.810315Z","closed_at":"2026-03-05T07:49:39.810282Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":743,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-22q9q","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Added 5 regression tests across 2 crates for security hardening in commit f07de35:

- fcp-sdk/retry.rs: 2 tests for pseudo-random jitter (bounded [0,1), varies across attempts)
All pass, clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-03-05T07:49:39Z"}]}
